title: Weather Clouds
description: Placeable clouds that create localized rain and snow.
body:
Weather Clouds adds two cloud blocks that create localized rain or snow.

Rain Clouds produce rain below them.
Snow Clouds produce snow and can build up snow layers on the ground.

The weather only exists under the cloud column and does not affect global world weather. The mod uses Minecraft’s vanilla weather renderer, so rain and snow look exactly the same as normal weather.

Multiple clouds can be placed together to create larger weather areas.

Credits:
Cloud textures are based on assets from [The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether).
The idea of localized cloud weather was inspired by [The Twilight Forest](https://github.com/TeamTwilight/twilightforest).
